_comment: Civilization: Heng Yue Sect (sect) at Zhao Country. Per civilization directive: sects are living organisms. Simulates population, economy, politics, lifecycle. Prime Directive: civilization exists objectively; player enters a world already in motion.
name: Heng Yue Sect

lifecycle.recruitment: annual examination of Zhao mortal youth
lifecycle.expansion: slow; constrained by Zhao Country size
lifecycle.decline: accelerated after Wang Lin's departure and elder deaths

simulation_notes.living_organism: Population, economy, and politics shift over time; the civilization changes whether or not the player acts.
simulation_notes.lifecycle_phases: recruitment -> expansion -> (decline OR stability) -> (schisms OR unity) -> (wars OR peace) -> recovery

perception_tiers.core_formation: Perceives lifecycle phase and internal factions.
perception_tiers.nascent_soul: Perceives complete civilization as a living system.
